notes: Shifted from Road B (no_match) | HD sells single-type connector packs (e.g. 1/2" EMT compression, 10-25 pack) but not a true mixed assortment kit under one /p/ SKU. Range covers small connector packs to contractor mixed-fitting bundles (EMT + PVC couplings, bushings, set-screw connectors).

Shifted from Road B (no_match) | 4x4" square boxes vary by depth, metal gauge, and ground/KO config. RACO/Steel City 1-1/2" deep galvanized on the low end, 2-1/8" deep with raised ground on the high end. No single canonical HD /p/ SKU fits the generic line item.
